name: Vegetarian Pancake Pie
description: Thin, savoury herb pancakes layered with a rich, creamy cheese and vegetable filling, then baked until bubbly. Similar to a layered crepe cake or vegetarian moussaka.

ingredients.name: free-range eggs
ingredients.notes: vegan substitute: 1 mashed banana, or 2 tbsp ground flaxseed mixed with 6 tbsp water

ingredients.name: ricotta
ingredients.notes: or cottage cheese, or vegan cream cheese

ingredients.name: grated cheddar
ingredients.notes: or mozzarella, or a plant-based alternative

steps.title: Mix the pancake batter
steps.content: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together {0001}, {0002} and {0003} until smooth. Stir in {0004} and {0005}.

steps.title: Cook the pancakes
steps.content: Lightly oil a non-stick frying pan with {0006} over medium heat. Pour in a small ladleful of batter, tilting the pan to coat the bottom. Cook for 1–2 minutes until golden, flip, and cook for another minute. Repeat until you have 8–10 pancakes.

steps.title: Sauté the aromatics
steps.content: Heat {0007} in a pan over medium heat. Sauté {0008} and {0009} until softened, about 5 minutes. Add {0010} and cook until browned.

steps.title: Wilt the spinach
steps.content: Toss in {0011} and cook until wilted. Remove from the heat and drain off any excess moisture.

steps.title: Mix the cheese filling
steps.content: In a separate bowl, mix {0012} with half of {0013}, {0014}, and season well. Stir in the mushroom-spinach mixture.

steps.title: Assemble the pie
steps.content: Preheat your oven to 180°C / 160°C fan (Gas Mark 4). Grease a standard round cake tin or pie dish. Place one pancake at the bottom, and spread a thin layer of the filling over it. Repeat this process (pancake, then filling) until all ingredients are used up, finishing with a pancake on top. Sprinkle the remaining {0013} over the top pancake.

steps.title: Bake
steps.content: Bake in the oven for 20 minutes until the cheese is bubbling and golden-brown. Let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing it like a pie.
